docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-15-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY INC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CHINESE AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEPHEN BAJC, CFO FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF CHINESE AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN BAJC, CFO. DEFENDANT RECOLOGY, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LAWRENCE STONE, RECOLOGY SAFETY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINESE AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RECOLOGY INC $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,340.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $6340 (INCLUDING COSTS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY INC
